channel.title: Gpu on Jodavid Ferreira
channel.description: Recent content in Gpu on Jodavid Ferreira

item.title: Comparação da eficiência de tempo de uma mesma função no R
item.description: Olá, in this Post it is verified the efficiency in question of time of execution of functions created for Matrix multiplication. An array with dimensions \(1000\times1000\) was generated using the rnorm function in R. The first function called mult.matrix uses the base function of R for matrix multiplication, for example, consider A as a square matrix, multiplication is obtained by A%*%A. In the second function, the byte code compiler which can increase the speed of some code was used.
